## LibraryPersistence.parseSubLibraryStorageData() function

Parse collection storage data for a specific sublibrary using standard paths.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function parseSubLibraryStorageData(subLibrary: SubLibraryStorageKey, rawJson: string | undefined): FileTree.IInMemoryFile[];
```
